description: Scaffold a new custom widget via CLI (covers `neomind widget create`; previously only list was covered).

turns.user: Scaffold a new custom widget named Custom Gauge, type gauge, output to /tmp/eval-widget.

per_turn: Turn 1: Agent runs `neomind widget create 'Custom Gauge' --widget-type gauge --output /tmp/eval-widget` (--json optional), and confirms manifest.json + bundle.js generation
expectations.overall: Must actually execute create, not just restate
